headline: A recovery plan built around you
subtext: Activities your practitioner sets, matched to where you are.
body: No generic worksheets. Your practitioner assigns the right activities for your stage of recovery.
caption:
Recovery from neuroplastic symptoms is not one-size-fits-all. What helps in week one is rarely what you need in week six.

On Neurowaze, your practitioner builds a plan around you, assigning the specific activities, exercises and reflections that fit where you are right now. As you progress, the plan moves with you. You always know what to do next, and why.

For people with chronic pain, fibromyalgia, IBS, tinnitus or long COVID, that structure turns a daunting journey into clear, manageable steps.

See how a personalised plan works at https://neurowaze.health/start-my-recovery

#ChronicPain #Neuroplasticity #Fibromyalgia #IBS #Tinnitus #LongCovid #MindBody #PainRecovery #Neurowaze
first_comment: Every Neurowaze plan is shaped by a practitioner trained in neuroplastic recovery and adjusts as you progress. Explore it here: https://neurowaze.health/start-my-recovery
